description: Run with debug_order_verification=variant (cast every ORDER BY expression to VARIANT to verify the VARIANT comparator matches the regular comparison ordering).

skip_tests.reason: VARIANT does not carry the VARCHAR collation, so ORDER BY on collated strings orders by the raw (binary) value instead of the collation.
UNION values order by tag first and then by value natively, but a UNION cast to VARIANT keeps only the active member value, so VARIANT orders by value regardless of tag.
ENUM is ordered by its dictionary (definition) order natively, but VARIANT stores the enum value as a string and orders it lexically.
VARIANT orders BIT/BITSTRING by its blob bytes, which differs from native BIT ordering.
Unnamed (positional) STRUCT cannot be cast to VARIANT, so ORDER BY over such values cannot be rewritten.
These tests assert EXPLAIN / Top-N optimizer plans; the injected CAST to VARIANT changes the plan output (the create_sort_key-style ORDER BY rewrite has the same limitation).
